description_long: This is a built-in wooden shelving unit with three open shelves, integrated into a recessed wall alcove. The shelves are made of light-colored wood with rounded front edges, and each shelf is supported by side and back panels. The back panel features two sets of electrical outlets, one above the middle shelf and one above the bottom shelf, suggesting the unit is designed for charging or powering devices. The surrounding structure is finished in a neutral, light beige color, blending seamlessly with the wall. The base of the unit sits flush with a tiled floor, and there are no visible doors, handles, or glass panels. The overall design is modern and functional, suitable for urban environments such as lobbies, offices, or public waiting areas.
description: A built-in, light wood shelving unit with three open shelves and integrated electrical outlets, set within a recessed wall alcove.
description_view_0: Front view showing three open wooden shelves, two sets of electrical outlets, and the surrounding wall alcove.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the shelves, the rounded front edges, and the flush fit with the wall.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the plain, solid back of the wall alcove with no visible shelves or features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the solid side of the wall alcove and the thickness of the structure.
